name: Restrict Allowed Standard Headers
description: Allow only the headers <cstdio>, <cstring>, <iostream>, <cmath>, and <string>. Headers already present in the template are allowed.
reason: 题目要求（README.md 113-119 行）：**IMPORTANT**: In this assignment, you are only allowed to use the following five C++ standard library headers: `<cstdio>`, `<cstring>`, `<iostream>`, `<cmath>`, `<string>`. If you need other functionality, please implement it yourself.

name: Restrict Modifications - Keep Local Test Helper Files Unchanged
description: Confirm src/exceptions.hpp and src/utility.hpp remain unchanged from the template.
reason: 题目要求（README.md 98 行）：**`src/exceptions.hpp`** and **`src/utility.hpp`**: Code required for correct local testing (**DO NOT MODIFY**).

name: Readability of map.hpp
description: Assess whether comments, naming, and structure in map.hpp are clear and readable.
